_placeholder_notice: PLACEHOLDER TRIGGER VALUES — designer owns the real numbers. See Development-Plan/PLACEHOLDER_LEDGER.md §4 for the furnishing list. Every N value below is a playtest-tuned guess; replace once you've seen the pipeline fire in a real session.

_meta.purpose: Configuration for the World Narrative System — trigger thresholds per NL layer per address. Mirrors the WMS memory-config.json pattern.
_meta.pattern: Every NL layer has an every-N-events-per-layer-per-address trigger bucket. Lower layers fire more often; higher layers accumulate from wider scope and fire less often.

nl2.description: NL2 (locality weaver) fires once per this many NL1 events at a locality. Placeholder.

nl3.description: NL3 (district weaver) fires once per this many NL2 events at a district. Placeholder.

nl4.description: NL4 (region weaver) fires once per this many NL3 events at a region. Placeholder.

nl5.description: NL5 (nation weaver) fires once per this many NL4 events at a nation. Placeholder.

nl6.description: NL6 (nation-to-world seam weaver) fires once per this many NL5 events world-wide. Placeholder.

nl7.description: NL7 (world embroiderer) fires once per this many NL6 events world-wide. Placeholder.

distance_filter._placeholder_notice: Shallow-going-outward depth rules per firing tier. See PLACEHOLDER_LEDGER.md §15. Word/token budgets per depth TBD in playtest.
